## Worktree Summary (source: Claude Haiku summary, compacted 27m ago)
Developer worked on debugging and fixing Codex message rendering issues in the xuanpu project.

**Observed:**
- Investigated file content being unexpectedly output to the chat interface during file reads in Codex streaming
- Examined event flow through multiple service files: `codex-app-server-manager.ts`, `codex-event-mapper.ts`, `codex-implementer.ts` to understand how events are normalized
- Reviewed type definitions in `opencode.ts` and `agent-protocol.ts` to understand event structures
- Created two new debugging scripts (`codex-rpc-dumper.ts` and `dump-codex-rpc.ts`) to capture and inspect Codex RPC messages for analysis
- Modified `codex-app-server-manager.ts` to add instrumentation for message dumping
- Attempted to run local development environment with `XUANPU_DUMP_CODEX_RPC=1 pnpm dev` but encountered postinstall script failures during electron-builder execution
- Troubleshot dependency issues by checking Python version and running `pnpm install` again to resolve slow postinstall script execution

**Signals:** Build/install process stalled during postinstall script execution (electron-builder native dependencies); unclear if debugging environment was successfully started.

{"method":"item/completed","params":{"item":{"type":"agentMessage","id":"msg_09e9389aa349a0730169ed7d133e9c819383a2ffc4424a3382","text":"已规划 TODO：
